events.title: Stock Market Update: Sensex, Nifty hit all-time highs
events.description: The Indian stock market indices, Sensex and Nifty, reached new record highs today fueled by positive global cues.

events.title: RBI Monetary Policy: Repo rate remains unchanged at 6.5%
events.description: The Reserve Bank of India decided to keep the repo rate steady at 6.5% for the seventh consecutive time.
